# services.nfs

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.nfs`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.nfs.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra nfs-utils configuration. |
| `services.nfs.idmapd.settings` | `attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | libnfsidmap configuration. Refer to <https://linux.die.net/man/5/idmapd.conf> for details. |
| `services.nfs.server.createMountPoints` | `boolean` | Whether to create the mount points in the exports file at startup time. |
| `services.nfs.server.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the kernel's NFS server. |
| `services.nfs.server.exports` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Contents of the /etc/exports file. See {manpage}`exports(5)` for the format. |
| `services.nfs.server.extraNfsdConfig` | `string` | Extra configuration options for the [nfsd] section of /etc/nfs.conf. |
| `services.nfs.server.hostName` | `null or string` | Hostname or address on which NFS requests will be accepted. Default is all. See the {option}`-H` option in {manpage}`nfsd(8)`. |
| `services.nfs.server.lockdPort` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Use a fixed port for the NFS lock manager kernel module (`lockd/nlockmgr`). This is useful if the NFS server is behind a firewall. |
| `services.nfs.server.mountdPort` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Use fixed port for rpc.mountd, useful if server is behind firewall. |
| `services.nfs.server.nproc` | `signed integer` | Number of NFS server threads. Defaults to the recommended value of 8. |
| `services.nfs.server.statdPort` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Use a fixed port for {command}`rpc.statd`. This is useful if the NFS server is behind a firewall. |
| `services.nfs.settings` | `attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | General configuration for NFS daemons and tools. See {manpage}`nfs.conf(5)` and related man pages for details. |
